_comment: Conway extension manifest — spec-pending, signal piece for DSP outreach. Not production code.
name: indiestack
description: Live access to 6,500+ developer tools with confidence scoring, migration intelligence, and session-aware context.

search.description: Search developer tools by need, framework, or category
search.returns: Ranked tools with metadata, confidence rationale, migration signals

tool_detail.description: Get full details for a specific tool
tool_detail.returns: Install commands, GitHub data, compatibility, pricing, alternatives

compare.returns: Feature comparison, migration data, community signals

compatibility_check.returns: Compatibility matrix with evidence from GitHub repos

gap_detection.description: Identify tool categories with unmet demand
gap_detection.returns: Search queries with no good matches — market opportunities

context_injection._comment: Structured context that Conway can pass to bias results toward the user's stack

schema.existing_tools: array of slugs — tools already in the project
schema.session_id: string — unique per-project, enables cross-session memory

session_tracking.description: Pass session_id across tool calls. IndieStack remembers searches, shortlists, and outcomes per session.

outcome_reporting.description: After integrating a tool, report success/failure to improve recommendations

pricing.agent_usage: Free, unlimited, no API key required
pricing.maker_pro: $19/mo — analytics on how agents discover your tool
